acid_proof.description: Knows how to deal with acid

acid_touch.description: Turns the surrounding biomes into a wasteland

agile.description: Quick, and always one step ahead
agile.name: Agile

backstep.description: Ability to step back before being hit in battle
backstep.name: Backstep

battle_reflexes.description: More likely to perform combat actions
battle_reflexes.name: Battle Reflexes

bomberman.description: Likes to throw bombs at their troubles
bomberman.name: Bomberman

bubble_defense.description: Creates a bubble shield for protection
bubble_defense.name: Bubble Defense

burning_feet.description: Burns the ground where he walks
burning_feet.name: Burning Feet

chosen_one.description: Unmatched power and magic at their command
chosen_one.name: The Chosen One

clone.description: An artificially created copy of an original being
clone.name: Clone

contagious.description: Increases the chance of plague outbreaks

content.description: At peace with their place in the world
content.name: Content

crippled.description: They used to be an adventurer like you

dash.description: Can dash toward enemies before attacking
dash.name: Dash

deceitful.description: They weave webs of lies to get what they want

deflect_projectile.description: Can deflect projectiles back at the attacker
deflect_projectile.name: Deflect Projectiles

desire_computer.description: Seeks the forbidden machine that knows all

desire_harp.description: Seeks the mystical instrument of the heavens
desire_harp.name: Ethereal Harp Desire

dodge.description: Knows how to get out of danger
dodge.name: Dodge

dragonslayer.description: The grandchildren will be tired of hearing this story
dragonslayer.name: Dragonslayer

energized.description: Has chance to spawn lightning on death
energized.name: Energized

eyepatch.description: The price of bravery or a cruel twist of fate

fragile_health.description: More vulnerable to damage and sickness

gluttonous.description: Consumes more food than most can imagine
gluttonous.name: Gluttonous

greedy.description: Nothing is ever enough for those ruled by greed

hard_skin.description: Nothing can penetrate this tough exterior

healing_aura.description: Restores health and cures plague of creatures around it
healing_aura.name: Healing Aura

heart_of_wizard.description: Possesses abundant mana reserves for spellcasting
heart_of_wizard.name: Heart of Wizard

honest.description: They value honesty above all, even when it hurts
honest.name: Honest

hotheaded.description: Has a short fuse and is prone to starting fights
hotheaded.name: Hotheaded

immortal.description: Can't die from an old age
immortal.name: Immortal

immune.description: Completely resistant to diseases and illnesses
immune.name: Immune

kingslayer.description: Killed a king and survived the aftermath... for now

lucky.description: Luck is always by their side
lucky.name: Lucky

mageslayer.description: Loves the smell of burned magic in the morning

mega_heartbeat.name: Mega Heartbeat

metamorphed.description: Has shifted into a new form

miracle_born.description: Appeared like a miracle into this world

moonchild.description: Grants unique bonuses during the Age of the Moon
moonchild.name: Moonchild

mush_spores.description: The MUSH must grow! Carries fungal spores that activate upon the host's death
mush_spores.name: MUSH Spores

mute.description: Unable to speak or use religion spells

pacifist.description: Strongly favors peace and avoids conflict whenever possible
pacifist.name: Pacifist

paranoid.description: Constantly on edge, they see threats in every corner

plague.description: Damages over time and spreads to nearby units

poison_immune.description: Completely immune to the effects of poison

psychopath.description: Their mind is a labyrinth of cold calculations

pyromaniac.description: Likes to see the world burn

soft_skin.description: Soft and squishy, like a marshmallow
